$comment: Cycle D (C11/C23 6.4.5p5) / D-FFI-STDDEF-WCHAR-PE-WIDTH: sizeof(L"ab" "cd") — the narrow "cd" widens to wchar_t so the run is Array<wchar_t,5>; sizeof = 5 * wchar_t width, which is FORMAT-keyed: pe64 -> 5*2 = 10, elf/mach-o -> 5*4 = 20. The ONE source witnesses BOTH the widen (count 5 includes the narrow segment) and the effective-prefix width across every target. Per-target exitCode overrides the manifest default. The release arm returns the same constant per target.
